mapper.select:
SELECT S.SERVER_ID AS serverId, S.SERVER_NM AS serverNm, S.SERVER_CLASS_CD AS serverClassCd, S.SERVER_IP AS serverIp, S.SERVER_DESC AS serverDesc, S.USE_YN AS useYn, C.DETAIL_NM AS serverClassNm FROM mhdb.TB_SERVER S, mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL C WHERE S.SERVER_CLASS_CD = C.DETAIL_CD AND 'SERVER_CLASS_CD' = C.GROUP_CD
AND S.USE_YN like '%' || #{useYn} || '%'
AND S.SERVER_ID = (#{serverId})::integer
AND UPPER(S.SERVER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(C.DETAIL_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(S.SERVER_IP) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND UPPER(S.SERVER_DESC) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%'
AND ( UPPER(S.SERVER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(C.DETAIL_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(S.SERVER_IP) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' OR UPPER(S.SERVER_DESC) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' )
ORDER BY S.SERVER_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_SERVER (SERVER_NM, SERVER_CLASS_CD, SERVER_IP, SERVER_DESC, USE_YN) VALUES (#{serverNm}, #{serverClassCd}, #{serverIp}, #{serverDesc}, 'Y')
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_SERVER SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE SERVER_ID = (#{serverId})::integer
UPDATE mhdb.TB_SERVER SET SERVER_NM = #{serverNm}, SERVER_CLASS_CD = #{serverClassCd}, SERVER_IP = #{serverIp}, SERVER_DESC = #{serverDesc}, USE_YN = #{useYn} WHERE SERVER_ID = (#{serverId})::integer
